untranslatable_reason: Calendar-based month detection (January/February) is not available in the allowed indicators list. The allowed indicators are technical (RSI, MACD, moving averages, etc.) and do not include calendar date or month extraction functions. To translate this signal, a DATE or MONTH indicator would be needed.
translation_notes: Signal SSRN_1150080_2 is a calendar anomaly strategy based on the January Effect for Indian equity indices. The core logic requires identifying the calendar month (January for entry, February for exit), which is outside the scope of technical indicators. The holding period of 31 days has been captured in hold_days_max, but the temporal entry/exit trigger cannot be expressed with available indicators. Recommendation: Implement calendar-based entry/exit logic separately in the backtest engine, or add DATE/MONTH to allowed indicators.
